general.g_text_audio:
여자: 부산에 소포를 보내려고 하는데 지금 보내면 언제 도착해요? 
남자: 지금 보내시면 모레 도착할 거예요. 
여자: 오늘 저녁까지 도착할 수는 없을까요? 제가 좀 급해서요. 
남자: 오전에 보내셨으면 오늘 안에 도착하는데 지금은 너무 늦었어요. 지금은 특급으로 보내도 내일 오전에 도착해요. 
여자: 아, 그래요? 내일 오전까지 들어갈 수 있으면 그걸로 해 주세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Tôi muốn gửi một bưu kiện tới Busan, nếu bây giờ tôi gửi thì khi nào hàng sẽ đến nơi? 
Nam: Nếu bây giờ gửi thì ngày kia sẽ đến nơi. 
Nữ: Bưu kiện không thể tới trong tối nay được sao? Vì tôi cần nó tới nơi hơi gấp một chút. 
Nam: Nếu gửi vào buổi sáng thì bưu kiện sẽ tới trong ngày nhưng bây giờ thì muộn quá rồi. Bây giờ mà gửi chuyển phát nhanh thì cũng phải sáng mai mới tới nơi. 
Nữ: À, vậy sao? Nếu có thể tới trong sáng mai thì anh gửi bằng đường đó giúp tôi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: I want to send a parcel to Busan, if I send it now, when will it arrive?
Man: If you send it now, it will arrive the day after tomorrow.
Woman: Can't the parcel arrive tonight? I'm in a bit of a hurry.
Man: If you sent the parcel in the morning, it will arrive within today, but it's too late now. Even if you send it by express now, it will arrive tomorrow morning.
Woman: Oh, really? If it can arrive tomorrow morning, please do that.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Je veux envoyer un colis à Busan, si je l'envoie maintenant, quand arrivera-t-il ?
Homme : Si vous l'envoyez maintenant, il arrivera après-demain.
Femme : Le colis ne peut pas arriver ce soir ? Je suis un peu pressé.
Homme : Si vous avez envoyé le colis le matin, il arrivera dans la journée, mais il est trop tard maintenant. Même si vous l'envoyez par express maintenant, il arrivera demain matin.
Femme : Oh, vraiment ? S'il peut arriver demain matin, veuillez le faire.

#######

g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Quiero enviar un paquete a Busan, si lo envío ahora, ¿cuándo llegará?
Hombre: Si lo envías ahora, llegará pasado mañana.
Mujer: ¿No puede llegar el paquete esta noche? Tengo un poco de prisa.
Hombre: Si enviaste el paquete por la mañana, llegará hoy, pero ya es demasiado tarde. Incluso si lo envía por expreso ahora, llegará mañana por la mañana.
Mujer: Ah, ¿en serio? Si puede llegar mañana por la mañana, por favor hágalo.

g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Saya mau kirim parsel ke Busan, kalau saya kirim sekarang, kapan sampainya?
Pria: Jika Anda mengirimnya sekarang, itu akan tiba lusa.
Wanita: Tidak bisakah paketnya tiba malam ini? Aku sedang sedikit terburu-buru.
Pria: Jika Anda mengirim paket di pagi hari, itu akan tiba dalam hari ini, tetapi sekarang sudah terlambat. Bahkan jika Anda mengirimnya dengan express sekarang, itu akan tiba besok pagi.
Wanita: Oh, benarkah? Jika bisa tiba besok pagi, tolong lakukan itu.

g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: 釜山に荷物を送りたいのですが、今送るといつ届きますか?
男：今送れば明後日には届きます。
女性: 小包は今夜到着できませんか?ちょっと急いでいます。
男：午前中に発送したら今日中に届きますが、もう遅いです。今速達で送っても明日の朝には届きます。
女：あ、そうですか。明日の朝に到着できるなら、そうしてください。

Frau: Kann das Paket heute Abend nicht ankommen? Ich habe es etwas eilig.
Mann: Wenn Sie das Paket morgens abgeschickt haben, kommt es heute an, aber jetzt ist es zu spät. Selbst wenn Sie es jetzt per Express schicken, wird es morgen früh ankommen.
Frau: Ach, wirklich? Wenn es morgen früh ankommen kann, tun Sie dies bitte.

g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：我想寄一个包裹到釜山，如果我现在寄，什么时候能到？
男：现在寄的话，后天就到了。
女：包裹今晚不能到吗？我有点着急。
男：如果你早上寄包裹，今天就到了，但现在太晚了。即使你现在用快递寄，明天早上就会到。
女：哦，真的吗？如果它明天早上可以到达，请这样做。

g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Я хочу отправить посылку в Пусан, если я отправлю ее сейчас, когда она придет?
Мужчина: Если отправишь сейчас, оно придет послезавтра.
Женщина: Разве посылка не может прийти сегодня вечером? Я немного тороплюсь.
Мужчина: Если вы отправили посылку утром, она придет сегодня, но уже слишком поздно. Даже если вы отправите его экспрессом сейчас, оно прибудет завтра утром.
Женщина: О, правда? Если он может прибыть завтра утром, пожалуйста, сделайте это.

ผู้หญิง: ฉันต้องการส่งพัสดุไปปูซาน ถ้าส่งตอนนี้ ของจะมาถึงเมื่อไหร่?
ผู้ชาย : ถ้าส่งตอนนี้ของจะมาถึงวันมะรืนนี้ครับ
ผู้หญิง: พัสดุมาถึงคืนนี้ไม่ได้เหรอ? ฉันกำลังรีบนิดหน่อย

ผู้หญิง: โอ้จริงเหรอ? หากมาถึงพรุ่งนี้เช้าได้โปรดดำเนินการด้วย

Mulher: Quero enviar um pacote para Busan, se enviar agora, quando chegará?

Mulher: O pacote não pode chegar hoje à noite? Estou com um pouco de pressa.
Homem: Se você enviou o pacote pela manhã, ele chegará hoje, mas agora é tarde demais. Mesmo que você envie por expresso agora, ele chegará amanhã de manhã.
Mulher: Ah, é mesmo? Se puder chegar amanhã de manhã, faça isso.

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: मुझे बुसान एक पार्सल भेजना है, अभी भेजूंगी तो कब आएगा?
आदमी: अभी भेजो तो परसों आ जायेगा।
महिला: क्या पार्सल आज रात को नहीं आ सकता? मैं थोड़ा जल्दी में हूं.
आदमी: अगर आपने सुबह पार्सल भेजा है तो वह आज ही आ जाएगा, लेकिन अब बहुत देर हो चुकी है। भले ही आप इसे अभी एक्सप्रेस से भेजें, यह कल सुबह आ जाएगा।
महिला: ओह, सच में? यदि यह कल सुबह आ सके तो कृपया ऐसा करें।

explain.vi:
Hai người này đang nói về điều gì? 
1. Cách gửi bưu kiện nhanh chóng
2. Cách gửi bưu kiện với giá rẻ
3. Cách đóng gói bưu kiện cẩn thận
4. Cách gửi bưu kiện dễ dàng
--------------------
Nhân vật nữ hơi vội và muốn bưu kiện nhanh tới nơi nên chọn đáp án 1.
explain.en:
What are these two talking about?
1. How to send the parcel quickly
2. How to send the parcel cheaply
3. How to pack the parcel carefully
4. How to send the parcel easily
--------------------
The female is in a bit of a hurry and wants the parcel to arrive quickly, so 1 is correct.

ये दोनों क्या बात कर रहे हैं?
1. पार्सल जल्दी कैसे भेजें
2. सस्ते में पार्सल कैसे भेजें
3. पार्सल को सावधानीपूर्वक कैसे पैक करें
4. पार्सल आसानी से कैसे भेजें
------------------------
महिला थोड़ी जल्दी में है और चाहती है कि पार्सल जल्दी पहुंच जाए, इसलिए 1 सही है।

#######

1. How to send the parcel quickly
2. How to send the parcel cheaply
3. How to pack the parcel carefully
4. How to send the parcel easily
--------------------
The female is in a bit of a hurry and wants the parcel to arrive quickly, so 1 is correct.

explain.vi:
Chọn nội dung đúng với hội thoại được nghe. 
1. Người phụ nữ gửi bưu kiện từ Busan. 
2. Người phụ nữ muốn nhanh nhận được bưu kiện. 
3. Người phụ nữ sẽ gửi bưu kiện bằng đường chuyển phát nhanh. 
4. Sáng mai người phụ nữ sẽ nhận được bưu kiện. 
--------------------
내일 오전까지 들어갈 수 있으면 그걸로 해 주세요. Người phụ nữ nói rằng nếu có thể tới trong sáng mai thì hãy gửi bằng đường đó, tức là đường chuyển phát nhanh.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 선생님, 안녕하세요? 다음 주부터 방학이라 인사드리러 왔어요. 
남자: 어, 어서 와요. (조금 쉬고)이번 방학에는 뭐 할 거예요? 
여자: 방학을 좀 특별하게 보내고 싶어서 자전거 여행을 해 보려고요. 
남자: 음, 자전거 여행 좋죠. 힘들기는 하겠지만 좋은 경험이 될 거예요. 
여자: 네. 그리고 기타도 한번 배워 보려고 해요. 
남자: 새로운 걸 배워 보는 것도 좋겠네요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Em chào thầy ạ. Từ tuần sau chúng em sẽ nghỉ hè nên em tới để chào thầy ạ. 
Nam: Ồ, mau vào đi. (Nghỉ một lát) Em định làm gì trong kỳ nghỉ hè này? 
Nữ: Em muốn trải qua một kỳ nghỉ thật đặc biệt nên định đi du lịch bằng xe đạp ạ. 
Nam: Ừm, đi du lịch bằng xe đạp cũng vui đó. Sẽ vất vả nhưng đó sẽ là một trải nghiệm tuyệt vời. 
Nữ: Vâng. Và em cũng muốn thử một lần học guitar. 
Nam: Sẽ rất tuyệt khi học điều gì đó mới mẻ đó.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Teacher, how are you? From next week we will be on summer vacation, so I came to say goodbye.
Man: Oh, come in quickly. (Stops talking for a moment) What are you going to do this summer vacation?
Woman: I want to spend my vacation special, so I'm going to go on a bike trip.
Man: Well, traveling by bike is also fun. It may be hard but it will be a great experience.
Woman: Yes. And I also want to try to learn guitar.
Man: It would be great to learn something new.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Professeur, comment allez-vous ? À partir de la semaine prochaine, nous serons en vacances d'été, alors je suis venu vous dire au revoir.
Homme : Oh, entrez vite. (Il arrête de parler un instant) Qu'est-ce que tu vas faire pendant les vacances d'été ?
Femme : Je veux passer mes vacances spéciales, alors je vais faire un voyage à vélo.
Homme : Eh bien, voyager à vélo est aussi amusant. Ce sera peut-être difficile, mais ce sera une expérience formidable.
Femme : Oui. Et je veux aussi essayer d'apprendre la guitare.
Homme : Ce serait formidable d'apprendre quelque chose de nouveau.

#######

Woman: Teacher, how are you? From next week we will be on summer vacation, so I came to say goodbye.
Man: Oh, come in quickly. (Stops talking for a moment) What are you going to do this summer vacation?
Woman: I want to spend my vacation special, so I'm going to go on a bike trip.
Man: Well, traveling by bike is also fun. It may be hard but it will be a great experience.
Woman: Yes. And I also want to try to learn guitar.
Man: It would be great to learn something new.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Maestra, ¿cómo está? A partir de la próxima semana estaremos de vacaciones de verano, así que vine a despedirme.
Hombre: Oh, entra rápido. (Deja de hablar por un momento) ¿Qué vas a hacer estas vacaciones de verano?
Mujer: Quiero pasar mis vacaciones especiales, así que voy a hacer un viaje en bicicleta.
Hombre: Bueno, viajar en bicicleta también es divertido. Puede ser difícil, pero será una gran experiencia.
Mujer: Sí. Y también quiero intentar aprender guitarra.
Hombre: Sería genial aprender algo nuevo.

g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Guru, bagaimana kabarmu? Mulai minggu depan kita akan berlibur musim panas, jadi aku datang untuk mengucapkan selamat tinggal.
Pria: Oh, cepat masuk. (Berhenti berbicara sejenak) Apa yang akan kamu lakukan pada liburan musim panas ini?
Wanita: Saya ingin menghabiskan liburan khusus saya, jadi saya akan pergi bersepeda.
Pria: Nah, bepergian dengan sepeda juga menyenangkan. Ini mungkin sulit tetapi itu akan menjadi pengalaman yang luar biasa.
Wanita: Ya. Dan saya juga ingin mencoba belajar gitar.
Pria: Akan sangat bagus untuk mempelajari sesuatu yang baru.

女：先生、お元気ですか？来週から夏休みなのでさよならを言いに来ました。
男：ああ、早く来て。 （しばらく話すのをやめる）この夏休みは何をする予定ですか？
女性：休暇を特別に過ごしたいので、自転車旅行に行きます。
男性：そうですね、自転車での旅も楽しいですよね。大変かもしれませんが、いい経験になります。
女性: はい。そして、ギターも習いたいです。
男性: 何か新しいことを学ぶのは素晴らしいことです.

g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Lehrer, wie geht es dir? Ab nächster Woche sind wir in den Sommerferien, also bin ich gekommen, um mich zu verabschieden.
Mann: Oh, komm schnell rein. (Hört für einen Moment auf zu reden) Was wirst du in den Sommerferien machen?
Frau: Ich möchte meinen Urlaub besonders verbringen, also mache ich eine Fahrradtour.
Mann: Na ja, Fahrradfahren macht auch Spaß. Es mag schwer sein, aber es wird eine großartige Erfahrung sein.
Frau: Ja. Und ich möchte auch versuchen, Gitarre zu lernen.
Mann: Es wäre großartig, etwas Neues zu lernen.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 요즘 퇴근 후에 뭐 해요? 매일 일찍 나가는 것 같아요. 
여자: 아, 집 근처 가구 만드는 곳에 가서 책상을 만들고 있어요. 
남자: 책상요? 책상을 사지 않고 만들어요? 
여자: 네. 좀 큰 책상을 갖고 싶어서 시작했는데 아주 재미있어요. 그래서 다음에는 식탁도 만들어 보려고요. 
남자: 그런 걸 할 줄 알아요? 나는 작은 상자도 못 만드는데... 
여자: 가구 만드는 곳에 가면 다 가르쳐 줘요. 하고 싶으면 같이 가요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Dạo này cô làm gì sau khi tan làm vậy? Hình như ngày nào tôi cũng thấy cô về sớm. 
Nữ: À, tôi đến nơi làm đồ nội thất gần nhà để làm bàn làm việc. 
Nam: Bàn làm việc? Cô không mua mà làm bàn làm việc sao? 
Nữ: Ừ. Tôi muốn có một cái bàn lớn một chút nên mới làm, nhưng làm rồi mới thấy rất thú vị. Vậy nên lần sau tôi cũng định làm bàn ăn. 
Nam: Cô biết làm sao? Đến cái hộp nhỏ thôi mà tôi còn không biết làm... 
Nữ: Đến nơi làm đồ nội thất thì họ sẽ dạy hết. Nếu anh muốn thì mình đi chung đi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What do you do after work these days? It seems like you leave the office early every day.
Woman: Oh, I go to a furniture making shop near my house to make a desk.
Man: Desk? You make your own desk without buying it, don't you?
Woman: Yes. I started because I wanted a big desk, and it's very interesting. So I'm going to make a table next time.
Man: You know how to make it, don't you? I can't even make a small box...
Woman: If you go to the furniture making shop, they'll teach you everything. Let's go together if you want to do it.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Que faites-vous après le travail ces jours-ci ? Il semble que vous quittiez le bureau tôt chaque jour.
Femme : Oh, je vais dans un magasin de fabrication de meubles près de chez moi pour fabriquer un bureau.
Homme : Bureau ? Vous faites votre propre bureau sans l'acheter, n'est-ce pas ?
Femme : Oui. J'ai commencé parce que je voulais un grand bureau, et c'est très intéressant. Je ferai donc un tableau la prochaine fois.
Homme : Vous savez comment le faire, n'est-ce pas ? Je ne peux même pas faire une petite boîte...
Femme : Si vous allez à l'atelier de fabrication de meubles, ils vous apprendront tout. Allons-y ensemble si tu veux le faire.

#######

Hombre: ¿Qué haces después del trabajo estos días? Parece que sales temprano de la oficina todos los días.
Mujer: Ay, voy a un taller de muebles cerca de mi casa para hacer un escritorio.
Hombre: ¿Escritorio? Haces tu propio escritorio sin comprarlo, ¿no?
Mujer: Sí. Empecé porque quería un escritorio grande y es muy interesante. Así que voy a hacer una mesa la próxima vez.
Hombre: Sabes cómo hacerlo, ¿no? Ni siquiera puedo hacer una caja pequeña...
Mujer: Si vas a la mueblería te enseñan todo. Vamos juntos si quieres hacerlo.

Wanita: Ya. Saya mulai karena saya ingin meja besar, dan itu sangat menarik. Jadi saya akan membuat tabel waktu berikutnya.
Pria: Anda tahu cara membuatnya, bukan? Saya bahkan tidak bisa membuat kotak kecil ...
Wanita: Jika Anda pergi ke toko pembuatan furnitur, mereka akan mengajari Anda segalanya. Ayo pergi bersama jika kamu ingin melakukannya.

女性: はい。大きなデスクが欲しくて始めたのですが、とても面白いです。というわけで、次回はテーブルを作っていきます。

女：家具屋に行けば何でも教えてくれるよ。やりたいなら一緒に行きましょう。

Frau: Wenn du in die Möbelwerkstatt gehst, wird dir alles beigebracht. Lassen Sie uns zusammen gehen, wenn Sie es tun möchten.

女人：如果你去家具店，他们会教你一切。如果你愿意，我们一起去吧。

ผู้ชาย: ช่วงนี้คุณทำอะไรหลังเลิกงาน? ดูเหมือนคุณจะออกจากออฟฟิศเร็วทุกวัน
ผู้หญิง: อ๋อ ฉันไปร้านทำเฟอร์นิเจอร์ใกล้บ้านเพื่อทำโต๊ะ
ผู้ชาย: โต๊ะเหรอ? คุณทำโต๊ะเองโดยไม่ต้องซื้อใช่ไหม?
ผู้หญิง: ใช่. ฉันเริ่มต้นเพราะฉันต้องการโต๊ะขนาดใหญ่ และมันน่าสนใจมาก คราวหน้าผมจะจัดโต๊ะครับ.
ผู้ชาย: คุณรู้วิธีทำมันใช่ไหม? กล่องเล็กๆยังทำไม่ได้...
ผู้หญิง: ถ้าคุณไปร้านทำเฟอร์นิเจอร์ พวกเขาจะสอนคุณทุกอย่าง ไปด้วยกันเลยถ้าอยากทำ

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: आजकल काम के बाद क्या करते हो? ऐसा लगता है जैसे आप हर दिन ऑफिस से जल्दी निकल जाते हैं।
महिला: ओह, मैं डेस्क बनाने के लिए अपने घर के पास एक फर्नीचर बनाने वाली दुकान पर जाती हूं।
आदमी: डेस्क? आप बिना खरीदे ही अपना डेस्क बना लेते हैं, है न?
महिला: हाँ. मैंने शुरुआत इसलिए की क्योंकि मुझे एक बड़ी डेस्क चाहिए थी, और यह बहुत दिलचस्प है। इसलिए मैं अगली बार एक तालिका बनाने जा रहा हूँ।
आदमी: तुम्हें पता है कि इसे कैसे बनाना है, है ना? मैं एक छोटा बक्सा भी नहीं बना सकता...
महिला: यदि तुम फर्नीचर बनाने वाली दुकान पर जाओगे तो वे तुम्हें सब कुछ सिखा देंगे। यदि आप ऐसा करना चाहते हैं तो आइए साथ मिलकर चलें।

g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Bugünlerde işten sonra ne yapıyorsun? Görünüşe göre her gün ofisten erken çıkıyorsun.
Kadın: Ah, evimin yakınındaki mobilyacıya masa yapmaya gidiyorum.
Adam: Masa mı? Satın almadan kendi masanı yapıyorsun, değil mi?
Kadın: Evet. Büyük bir masa istediğim için başladım ve bu çok ilginç. Bir dahaki sefere bir masa yapacağım.
Adam: Nasıl yapılacağını biliyorsun, değil mi? Küçük bir kutu bile yapamıyorum...
Kadın: Mobilyacıya gidersen sana her şeyi öğretir. Eğer istersen birlikte gidelim.

#######

Man: What do you do after work these days? It seems like you leave the office early every day.
Woman: Oh, I go to a furniture making shop near my house to make a desk.
Man: Desk? You make your own desk without buying it, don't you?
Woman: Yes. I started because I wanted a big desk, and it's very interesting. So I'm going to make a table next time.
Man: You know how to make it, don't you? I can't even make a small box...
Woman: If you go to the furniture making shop, they'll teach you everything. Let's go together if you want to do it.

2. Người đàn ông biết cách làm bàn làm việc. 
3. Sau khi tan làm, người phụ nữ đi đến nơi làm đồ nội thất. 
4. Người đàn ông định làm chiếc bàn ăn cho người phụ nữ. 
--------------------

식탁: Bàn ăn

V + (으)려고 하다: Định, sẽ làm gì đó. 
V + (으)면: Cấu trúc nếu - thì. 
V + (으)ㄹ 줄 알다: Biết là, nghĩ là. 

Người phụ nữ đến nơi làm đồ nội thất để tự làm đồ nội thất (bàn học/bàn làm việc).

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 어, 이게 뭐예요? 티셔츠네요. 
여자: 네. 친구가 선물로 준 건데 사이즈가 좀 커요. 바꾸고 싶은데 선물 받은 거라서 고민이에요. 
남자: 혹시 상자 안에 교환권 없어요? 요즘엔 다른 물건으로 바꿀 수 있는 교환권을 선물에 넣어 주는데요. 
여자: 아, 여기 상자 안에 있네요. 이걸 가지고 가면 바꿀 수 있어요? 
남자: 네. 가까운 백화점에 선물 받은 물건과 교환권을 가지고 가면 바꿀 수 있어요. 
여자: 친구에게 부탁하지 않고 직접 바꿀 수 있으니까 편하겠네요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Ơ, cái này là gì vậy? À, là áo thun. 
Nữ: Vâng. Đây là quà bạn tôi tặng nhưng size hơi rộng. Tôi cũng muốn đổi lắm, nhưng vì đây là quà tặng nên tôi vẫn đang suy nghĩ. 
Nam: Không biết trong hộp có phiếu đổi hàng không? Dạo này người ta hay bỏ phiếu đổi hàng sang một món đồ khác vào trong hộp quà luôn. 
Nữ: À, trong hộp có đây. Mang cái này theo thì có thể đổi được không nhỉ? 
Nam: Có chứ. Nếu bạn mang theo quà bạn được tặng cùng với phiếu đổi hàng đến trung tâm thương mại gần nhất thì sẽ đổi được thôi. 
Nữ: Thật thoải mái khi có thể tự mình đổi mà không phải nhờ đến bạn bè nhỉ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Oh, what is this? Oh, it's a t-shirt.
Woman: Yes. This is a gift from my friend, but the size is a bit large. I want to change it, but I'm worried because I got it as a gift.
Man: Is there an exchange ticket in the box? These days, an exchange ticket that can be used to exchanged for other items are given with the gift.
Woman: Oh, here it is in the box. Can I exchange this if I bring this with me?
Man: Yes. You can change it if you take your gift and the exchange ticket to a nearby department store.
Woman: It's comforting to be able to change on your own without having to ask your friends.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Oh, qu'est-ce que c'est ? Oh, c'est un t-shirt.
Femme : Oui. C'est un cadeau de mon ami, mais la taille est un peu grande. Je veux le changer, mais je suis inquiet parce que je l'ai eu en cadeau.
Homme : Y a-t-il un billet d'échange dans la boîte ? De nos jours, un billet d'échange qui peut être utilisé pour échanger contre d'autres articles est donné avec le cadeau.
Femme : Oh, le voici dans la boîte. Puis-je l'échanger si je l'apporte avec moi ?
Homme : Oui. Vous pouvez le changer si vous apportez votre cadeau et le billet d'échange dans un grand magasin à proximité.
Femme : C'est réconfortant de pouvoir changer par soi-même sans avoir à demander à ses amis.

Woman: It's comforting to be able to change on your own without having to ask your friends.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:

Женщина: Да. Это подарок от моего друга, но размер немного великоват. Хочу поменять, но волнуюсь, потому что мне его подарили.
Мужчина: В коробке есть обменный билет? В наши дни в подарок дарят обменный билет, который можно обменять на другие предметы.

Мужчина: Да. Вы можете поменять его, если принесете подарок и обменный билет в ближайший универмаг.

g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: อ้าว นี่มันอะไรเนี่ย? อ๋อ มันคือเสื้อยืด
ผู้หญิง: ใช่. นี่เป็นของขวัญจากเพื่อนของฉันแต่ขนาดจะใหญ่ไปหน่อย อยากเปลี่ยนแต่ก็กังวลเพราะได้เป็นของขวัญ
ผู้ชาย: มีตั๋วแลกในกล่องมั้ย? ทุกวันนี้จะมีการมอบตั๋วแลกเปลี่ยนที่สามารถนำไปใช้แลกเปลี่ยนกับสิ่งของอื่นพร้อมกับของขวัญได้
ผู้หญิง: โอ้ นี่อยู่ในกล่อง ฉันสามารถแลกเปลี่ยนสิ่งนี้ได้หรือไม่หากฉันนำสิ่งนี้ติดตัวไปด้วย?
ผู้ชาย: ใช่. คุณสามารถเปลี่ยนได้หากคุณนำของขวัญและตั๋วแลกไปที่ห้างสรรพสินค้าใกล้เคียง
ผู้หญิง: ฉันรู้สึกสบายใจที่สามารถเปลี่ยนแปลงได้ด้วยตัวเองโดยไม่ต้องถามเพื่อน

महिला: हाँ. यह मेरे दोस्त की ओर से एक उपहार है, लेकिन आकार थोड़ा बड़ा है। मैं इसे बदलना चाहता हूं, लेकिन मैं चिंतित हूं क्योंकि यह मुझे उपहार के रूप में मिला है।
आदमी: क्या डिब्बे में एक्सचेंज टिकट है? इन दिनों, उपहार के साथ एक विनिमय टिकट दिया जाता है जिसका उपयोग अन्य वस्तुओं के बदले में किया जा सकता है।
महिला: ओह, यह यहाँ डिब्बे में है। अगर मैं इसे अपने साथ लाऊं तो क्या मैं इसे बदल सकता हूं?
आदमी: हाँ. यदि आप अपना उपहार और विनिमय टिकट पास के डिपार्टमेंट स्टोर में ले जाते हैं तो आप इसे बदल सकते हैं।
महिला: अपने दोस्तों से पूछे बिना खुद को बदलने में सक्षम होना आरामदायक है।

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 민수 씨, 아침에 이메일 봤어요? 
남자: 아니요. 아직 못 봤어요. 무슨 이메일인데요? 
여자: 다음 달부터 회사 식당이 아침에도 문을 열어요. 
남자: 그래요? 이제 회사 식당에서 아침을 먹어야겠네요. 제가 혼자 살아서 아침을 못 먹을 때가 많거든요. 
여자: 저는 집에서 먹고 출근하는데 다음 달부터 회사에서 먹으려고 해요. 그러면 시간을 아낄 수 있을 것 같아서요. 
남자: 그럼 가끔 식당에서 만날 수 있겠네요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Minsoo, sáng nay anh đã đọc email chưa? 
Nam: Chưa. Tôi vẫn chưa xem. Email gì vậy? 
Nữ: Từ tháng sau, nhà ăn công ty mở cửa vào cả buổi sáng. 
Nam: Vậy sao? Vậy giờ tôi phải ăn sáng ở nhà ăn công ty mới được. Tôi sống một mình nên nhiều khi không ăn sáng. 
Nữ: Tôi thường ăn sáng ở nhà xong đi làm nhưng từ tháng sau tôi sẽ ăn ở công ty. Nếu vậy thì có thể tiết kiệm được thời gian. 
Nam: Vậy thỉnh thoảng chúng ta có thể gặp nhau ở nhà ăn.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Minsoo, did you read the email this morning?
Man: No. I haven't seen it yet. What email is that?
Woman: From next month, the company canteen will be open in the morning as well.
Man: Really? So now I have to eat breakfast at the company canteen. Because I live alone, I often don't eat breakfast.
Woman: I usually eat breakfast at home and go to work, but from next month I will eat at the company. If so, I think I can save time.
Man: Then we can meet at the canteen sometimes.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Minsoo, avez-vous lu l'e-mail ce matin ?
Homme : Non. Je ne l'ai pas encore vu. De quel e-mail s'agit-il ?
Femme : À partir du mois prochain, la cantine d'entreprise sera également ouverte le matin.
Homme : Vraiment ? Alors maintenant, je dois prendre mon petit-déjeuner à la cantine de l'entreprise. Parce que je vis seul, je ne prends souvent pas de petit-déjeuner.
Femme : D'habitude, je prends mon petit-déjeuner à la maison et je vais au travail, mais à partir du mois prochain, je mangerai à l'entreprise. Si c'est le cas, je pense pouvoir gagner du temps.
Homme : Ensuite, nous pouvons parfois nous rencontrer à la cantine.

#######

Woman: I usually eat breakfast at home and go to work, but from next month I will eat at the company. If so, I think I can save time.

Hombre: No. No lo he visto todavía. ¿Qué correo electrónico es ese?
Mujer: A partir del próximo mes, el comedor de la empresa estará abierto también por la mañana.
Hombre: ¿En serio? Así que ahora tengo que desayunar en el comedor de la empresa. Como vivo solo, a menudo no desayuno.
Mujer: Suelo desayunar en casa y voy al trabajo, pero a partir del próximo mes comeré en la empresa. Si es así, creo que puedo ahorrar tiempo.
Hombre: Entonces podemos encontrarnos en la cantina a veces.

Pria: Benarkah? Jadi sekarang saya harus sarapan di kantin perusahaan. Karena saya tinggal sendiri, saya sering tidak sarapan.
Wanita: Saya biasanya sarapan di rumah dan pergi bekerja, tetapi mulai bulan depan saya akan makan di perusahaan. Jika demikian, saya pikir saya dapat menghemat waktu.
Pria: Kalau begitu kita bisa bertemu di kantin kadang-kadang.

महिला: मिनसू, क्या तुमने आज सुबह ईमेल पढ़ा?
आदमी: नहीं, मैंने अभी तक इसे नहीं देखा है। वह कौन सा ईमेल है?
महिला: अगले महीने से कंपनी की कैंटीन सुबह भी खुलेगी.
आदमी: सच में? इसलिए अब मुझे कंपनी कैंटीन में नाश्ता करना होगा। चूँकि मैं अकेला रहता हूँ, इसलिए मैं अक्सर नाश्ता नहीं करता।
महिला: मैं आमतौर पर घर पर नाश्ता करती हूं और काम पर जाती हूं, लेकिन अगले महीने से मैं कंपनी में खाना खाऊंगी। यदि हां, तो मुझे लगता है कि मैं समय बचा सकता हूं।
आदमी: तो फिर हम कभी-कभी कैंटीन में मिल सकते हैं।

Adam: Hayır. Henüz görmedim. Bu ne e-postası?

Adam: Gerçekten mi? Şimdi şirketin kantininde kahvaltı etmem gerekiyor. Yalnız yaşadığım için çoğu zaman kahvaltı yapmıyorum.
Kadın: Kahvaltıyı genelde evde yapıp işe gidiyorum ama önümüzdeki aydan itibaren yemeği şirkette yiyeceğim. Eğer öyleyse, zamandan tasarruf edebileceğimi düşünüyorum.
Adam: O zaman bazen kantinde buluşuruz.

#######

Woman: Minsoo, did you read the email this morning?
Man: No. I haven't seen it yet. What email is that?
Woman: From next month, the company canteen will be open in the morning as well.
Man: Really? So now I have to eat breakfast at the company canteen. Because I live alone, I often don't eat breakfast.
Woman: I usually eat breakfast at home and go to work, but from next month I will eat at the company. If so, I think I can save time.
Man: Then we can meet at the canteen sometimes.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 네, 인주 서비스 센터입니다. 무엇을 도와 드릴까요? 
남자: 새로 산 텔레비전이 갑자기 소리가 안 나와요. 
여자: 그럼 텔레비전을 한번 꺼 보세요. 그리고 잠시 후에 다시 켜 보세요. 
남자: 그렇게 해 봤는데 안 돼요. (잠시 쉬고) 오늘 고칠 수 있을까요? 
여자: 오늘은 늦어서 어렵고요. 내일 오전에 직원이 연락 드리고 고치러 갈 겁니다. 
남자: 네, 알겠습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Vâng, đây là trung tâm dịch vụ Inju. Tôi có thể giúp gì cho anh? 
Nam: Chiếc tivi tôi mới mua đột nhiên không có tiếng. 
Nữ: Vậy anh hãy tắt tivi đi. Rồi một lát sau hãy bật lại xem được không. 
Nam: Tôi thử rồi nhưng không được. (Một lát sau) Hôm nay bên chị có thể tới sửa được không? 
Nữ: Hôm nay muộn rồi nên hơi khó. Sáng mai nhân viên sẽ liên lạc và tới sửa cho anh ạ. 
Nam: Vâng, tôi biết rồi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Hello, this is the Inju service center. How can I help you with?
Man: My new television suddenly doesn't make any sound.
Woman: Then, turn off the television. And turn it back on after a while.
Man: I tried but it didn't work. (Stops talking for a moment) Can you come and fix it today?
Woman: It's late today, so it's a bit difficult. The staff will contact you tomorrow morning and come to fix it for you.
Man: Okay, thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Bonjour, c'est le centre de service Inju. Comment puis-je vous aider ?
Homme : Ma nouvelle télévision n'émet soudainement plus de son.
Femme : Ensuite, éteignez la télévision. Et rallumez-le au bout d'un moment.
Homme : J'ai essayé, mais ça n'a pas marché. (Il arrête de parler un instant) Pouvez-vous venir le réparer aujourd'hui ?
Femme : Il est tard aujourd'hui, donc c'est un peu difficile. Le personnel vous contactera demain matin et viendra le réparer pour vous.
Homme : D'accord, merci.

#######

Woman: Hello, this is the Inju service center. How can I help you with?
Man: My new television suddenly doesn't make any sound.
Woman: Then, turn off the television. And turn it back on after a while.
Man: I tried but it didn't work. (Stops talking for a moment) Can you come and fix it today?
Woman: It's late today, so it's a bit difficult. The staff will contact you tomorrow morning and come to fix it for you.
Man: Okay, thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Hola, este es el centro de servicio de Inju. ¿Cómo puedo ayudarte?
Hombre: Mi nuevo televisor de repente no hace ningún sonido.
Mujer: Entonces, apaga la televisión. Y vuelva a encenderlo después de un tiempo.
Hombre: Lo intenté pero no funcionó. (Deja de hablar por un momento) ¿Puedes venir a arreglarlo hoy?
Mujer: Hoy es tarde, así que es un poco difícil. El personal se pondrá en contacto contigo mañana por la mañana y vendrá a arreglarlo.
Hombre: Bien, gracias.

#######

Woman: Hello, this is the Inju service center. How can I help you with?

Woman: Then, turn off the television. And turn it back on after a while.

Woman: It's late today, so it's a bit difficult. The staff will contact you tomorrow morning and come to fix it for you.
Man: Okay, thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Halo, ini adalah pusat layanan Inju. Bagaimana saya bisa membantu Anda?
Pria: Televisi baru saya tiba-tiba tidak mengeluarkan suara.
Wanita: Kalau begitu, matikan televisi. Dan nyalakan kembali setelah beberapa saat.
Pria: Saya mencoba tetapi tidak berhasil. (Berhenti bicara sebentar) Bisakah Anda datang dan memperbaikinya hari ini?
Wanita: Hari ini sudah larut, jadi agak sulit. Staf akan menghubungi Anda besok pagi dan datang untuk memperbaikinya untuk Anda.
Pria: Oke, terima kasih.

g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: こんにちは、インジュ サービス センターです。どのようにお手伝いできますか?

女：では、テレビを消してください。そしてしばらくして電源を入れ直します。
男：やってみたけどダメだった（少し話すのをやめて）今日、修理に来てもらえますか？
女：今日は遅いので、ちょっと大変です。明日の朝、スタッフがご連絡し、修理に伺います。
男: わかりました、ありがとう。

ผู้หญิง: สวัสดี นี่คือศูนย์บริการอินจู ฉันจะช่วยคุณได้อย่างไร?
ผู้ชาย: จู่ๆ โทรทัศน์เครื่องใหม่ของฉันก็ไม่ส่งเสียงใดๆ
ผู้หญิง: จากนั้นปิดโทรทัศน์ และเปิดเครื่องอีกครั้งในภายหลัง
ชาย: ฉันพยายามแล้วแต่ไม่ได้ผล (หยุดพูดสักพัก) วันนี้คุณมาซ่อมได้ไหม?
ผู้หญิง: วันนี้สายแล้วเลยลำบากนิดหน่อย เจ้าหน้าที่จะติดต่อคุณพรุ่งนี้เช้าและจะมาแก้ไขให้คุณ

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: हेलो, यह इंजू सर्विस सेंटर है। मैं आपकी कैसे मदद कर सकता हूँ?
आदमी: मेरा नया टेलीविज़न अचानक कोई आवाज़ नहीं कर रहा है।
महिला: तो फिर टीवी बंद कर दीजिए. और थोड़ी देर बाद इसे वापस चालू कर दें।
आदमी: मैंने कोशिश की लेकिन यह काम नहीं किया। (एक पल के लिए बात करना बंद करके) क्या आप आज आकर इसे ठीक कर सकते हैं?
महिला: आज देर हो गई है इसलिए थोड़ी मुश्किल है. कर्मचारी कल सुबह आपसे संपर्क करेंगे और इसे ठीक करने के लिए आएंगे।

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 나도 운동 좀 해야 하는데...수미 씨는 요즘 무슨 운동 하세요? 
여자: 저는 인터넷으로 요가 수업을 듣고 있는데, 생각보다 괜찮아요. 
남자: 아, 인터넷으로 운동을 하면 집에서 할 수 있으니까 좋겠네요. 
여자: 네. 그리고 어려우면 화면을 멈추고 자세히 볼 수 있어서 좋아요. 
남자: 필요하면 다시 봐도 되고요. 
여자: 맞아요. 또 시간이 없으면 밤늦게 하거나 아침 일찍 해도 돼요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Tôi cũng phải tập thể dục một chút mới được... Dạo này Sumi đang tập môn thể thao gì? 
Nữ: Tôi đang tham gia các lớp học Yoga trực tuyến, và nó ổn hơn tôi nghĩ. 
Nam: Ồ, nếu có thể tập thể dục trực tuyến ở nhà thì thật tốt. 
Nữ: Vâng. Và nếu khó quá thì có thể tạm ngừng và xem lại chi tiết hơn nên tôi rất thích. 
Nam: Khi cần thì cũng có thể xem lại nữa.
Nữ: Đúng vậy. Hơn nữa nếu không có thời gian thì có thể tập vào đêm khuya hoặc sáng sớm cũng không sao.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: I think I need to exercise too... Sumi, what kind of exercise are you doing these days?
Woman: I'm taking yoga classes on the Internet, and it's better than I thought.
Man: Oh, it would be nice if you could exercise on the Internet because you can do it at home.
Woman: Yes. And if it's difficult, it's nice to be able to pause the screen and see it in detail.
Man: You can also watch it again if you need to.
Woman: That's right. If you don't have time, you can exercise late at night or early in the morning.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Je pense que j'ai besoin de faire de l'exercice aussi... Sumi, quel genre d'exercice fais-tu ces jours-ci ?
Femme : Je prends des cours de yoga sur Internet, et c'est mieux que je ne le pensais.
Homme : Oh, ce serait bien si vous pouviez faire de l'exercice sur Internet, car vous pouvez le faire à la maison.
Femme : Oui. Et si c'est difficile, c'est agréable de pouvoir mettre l'écran en pause et de le voir en détail.
Homme : Vous pouvez également le revoir si vous en avez besoin.
Femme : C'est vrai. Si vous n'avez pas le temps, vous pouvez faire de l'exercice tard le soir ou tôt le matin.

#######

Man: I think I need to exercise too... Sumi, what kind of exercise are you doing these days?
Woman: I'm taking yoga classes on the Internet, and it's better than I thought.
Man: Oh, it would be nice if you could exercise on the Internet because you can do it at home.
Woman: Yes. And if it's difficult, it's nice to be able to pause the screen and see it in detail.
Man: You can also watch it again if you need to.
Woman: That's right. If you don't have time, you can exercise late at night or early in the morning.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Creo que yo también necesito hacer ejercicio... Sumi, ¿qué tipo de ejercicio estás haciendo estos días?
Mujer: Estoy tomando clases de yoga por Internet, y es mejor de lo que pensaba.
Hombre: Oh, sería bueno que pudieras hacer ejercicio en Internet porque puedes hacerlo en casa.
Mujer: Sí. Y si es difícil, es bueno poder pausar la pantalla y verla en detalle.
Hombre: También puedes verlo de nuevo si lo necesitas.
Mujer: Así es. Si no tiene tiempo, puede hacer ejercicio tarde en la noche o temprano en la mañana.

#######

Woman: Yes. And if it's difficult, it's nice to be able to pause the screen and see it in detail.
Man: You can also watch it again if you need to.
Woman: That's right. If you don't have time, you can exercise late at night or early in the morning.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Saya pikir saya perlu berolahraga juga... Sumi, olahraga apa yang kamu lakukan hari ini?
Wanita: Saya mengikuti kelas yoga di Internet, dan itu lebih baik dari yang saya kira.
Pria: Oh, alangkah baiknya jika Anda bisa berolahraga di Internet karena Anda bisa melakukannya di rumah.
Wanita: Ya. Dan kalau susah, alangkah baiknya bisa pause layar dan melihatnya secara detail.
Pria: Anda juga dapat menontonnya lagi jika perlu.
Wanita: Itu benar. Jika tidak punya waktu, Anda bisa berolahraga larut malam atau dini hari.

#######

男：私も運動が必要かな… すみちゃん、最近どんな運動してるの？

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 민수 씨, 어제 드라마 “첫사랑’ 봤어요? 거기에서 두 사람이 어떤 섬에 갔는데 정말 아름다웠어요? 
남자: 아, 저도 그거 봤어요. 거기 제가 작년 여름휴가 때 간 곳이에요. 
여자: 정말로? 그 섬이 어디예요? 
남자: 여수에 있는 섬인데, 경치가 아름다워서 드라마에 자주 나와요. 
여자: 아, 그래요? 저도 다음에 한번 가 보고 싶어요. 
남자: 가기 전에 궁금한 거 있으면 물어보세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Minsoo, hôm qua cậu có xem bộ phim 'Mối tình đầu' không? Trong phim hai người đi đến một hòn đảo, nơi đó thực sự rất đẹp nhỉ? 
Nam: À, tớ cũng có xem bộ phim đó. Đó chính là nơi tớ đã đến trong kỳ nghỉ hè năm ngoái. 
Nữ: Thật sao? Hòn đảo đó ở đâu vậy? 
Nam: Đó là hòn đảo ở Yeosu, cảnh ở đó rất đẹp nên thường xuất hiện trong phim. 
Nữ: Ồ, vậy sao? Lần sau tớ cũng muốn đi tới nơi đó. 
Nam: Trước khi đi có gì thắc mắc thì cứ hỏi tớ nhé.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Minsoo, did you see the drama 'First Love' yesterday? Two characters went to an island, it's really beautiful, isn't it?
Man: Oh, I saw it, too. That's where I went on vacation last summer.
Woman: Really? Where is the island?
Man: It's an island in Yeosu, and the scenery is beautiful, so it often appears in dramas.
Woman: Oh, really? I want to go there next time, too.
Man: Ask me anything you're curious about before you go.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Minsoo, avez-vous vu le drame "First Love" hier ? Deux personnages sont allés sur une île, c'est vraiment beau, n'est-ce pas ?
Homme : Oh, je l'ai vu aussi. C'est là que je suis allé en vacances l'été dernier.
Femme : Vraiment ? Où est l'île ?
Homme : C'est une île de Yeosu, et le paysage est magnifique, donc il apparaît souvent dans les drames.
Femme : Oh, vraiment ? Je veux y aller la prochaine fois aussi.
Homme : Demandez-moi tout ce qui vous intéresse avant de partir.

g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Minsoo, você viu o drama 'First Love' ontem? Dois personagens foram para uma ilha, é lindo mesmo, não é?
Homem: Ah, eu também vi. Foi para lá que fui passar férias no verão passado.
Mulher: Sério? Onde fica a ilha?
Homem: É uma ilha em Yeosu e o cenário é lindo, por isso aparece frequentemente em dramas.
Mulher: Ah, é mesmo? Eu quero ir lá na próxima vez também.
Homem: Pergunte-me qualquer coisa que lhe interesse antes de ir.

#######

Woman: Minsoo, did you see the drama 'First Love' yesterday? Two characters went to an island, it's really beautiful, isn't it?
Man: Oh, I saw it, too. That's where I went on vacation last summer.
Woman: Really? Where is the island?
Man: It's an island in Yeosu, and the scenery is beautiful, so it often appears in dramas.
Woman: Oh, really? I want to go there next time, too.
Man: Ask me anything you're curious about before you go.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: मिनसू, क्या तुमने कल 'फर्स्ट लव' नाटक देखा? दो पात्र एक द्वीप पर गए, यह वास्तव में सुंदर है, है ना?
आदमी: ओह, मैंने भी देखा। पिछली गर्मियों में मैं यहीं छुट्टियाँ बिताने गया था।
महिला: सच में? द्वीप कहाँ है?
आदमी: यह येओसु में एक द्वीप है, और दृश्यावली सुंदर है, इसलिए यह अक्सर नाटकों में दिखाई देती है।
महिला: ओह, सच में? मैं अगली बार भी वहां जाना चाहता हूं.
आदमी: जाने से पहले मुझसे वह सब कुछ पूछो जिसके बारे में तुम उत्सुक हो।

#######

Woman: Minsoo, did you see the drama 'First Love' yesterday? Two characters went to an island, it's really beautiful, isn't it?
Man: Oh, I saw it, too. That's where I went on vacation last summer.
Woman: Really? Where is the island?
Man: It's an island in Yeosu, and the scenery is beautiful, so it often appears in dramas.
Woman: Oh, really? I want to go there next time, too.
Man: Ask me anything you're curious about before you go.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Minsoo, dün 'First Love' dizisini izledin mi? İki karakter bir adaya gitti, gerçekten çok güzel değil mi?
Adam: Aaa ben de gördüm. Geçen yaz tatile gittiğim yer orasıydı.
Kadın: Gerçekten mi? Ada nerede?
Adam: Yeosu'da bir ada ve manzara çok güzel, bu yüzden dizilerde sıklıkla karşımıza çıkıyor.
Kadın: Ah, gerçekten mi? Bir dahaki sefere ben de oraya gitmek istiyorum.
Adam: Gitmeden önce merak ettiğin şeyleri bana sor.

#######

Woman: Minsoo, did you see the drama 'First Love' yesterday? Two characters went to an island, it's really beautiful, isn't it?
Man: Oh, I saw it, too. That's where I went on vacation last summer.
Woman: Really? Where is the island?
Man: It's an island in Yeosu, and the scenery is beautiful, so it often appears in dramas.
Woman: Oh, really? I want to go there next time, too.
Man: Ask me anything you're curious about before you go.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: (‘ 딩동댕’) 주민 여러분께 알려 드립니다. 지금 우리 아파트에는 한 시간 전부터 물이 나오지 않고 있습니다. 미리 알려 드리지 못해 죄송합니다. 오후 다섯 시부터는 물이 나올 겁니다. 불편하시겠지만 조금만 더 기다려 주십시오. 다음부터는 꼭 미리 알려 드리겠습니다. (‘ 딩동댕’).

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: (Tinh toong teng) Các cư dân sống trong chung cư chú ý. Chung cư của chúng ta đã mất nước từ một tiếng trước. Chúng tôi xin lỗi vì đã không thông báo trước. Nước sẽ có lại từ năm giờ chiều. Dù sẽ có chút bất tiện nhưng mong các bạn hãy đợi thêm một lát nữa thôi. Lần sau chúng tôi nhất định sẽ thông báo trước. (Tinh toong teng)
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: (Ding dong daeng) I'd like to inform the residents. Now our apartment has been without water for an hour. Sorry for not letting you know in advance. Water will come out from 5pm. Sorry for the inconvenience, but please wait a little longer. We will let you know in advance from the next time. (Ding dong daeng)
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : (Ding dong daeng) J'aimerais informer les résidents. Maintenant, notre appartement est sans eau depuis une heure. Désolé de ne pas vous avoir prévenu à l'avance. L'eau sortira à partir de 17h. Désolé pour le dérangement, mais veuillez patienter encore un peu. Nous vous informerons à l'avance de la prochaine fois. (Ding dong daeng)

#######

4. Residents knew in advance that water was not coming out.
--------------------
<g>지나다:</g> To pass, to go by

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 민수 씨, 이번 주 수요일에 시간 있어요? 얼마 전에 이사를 했는데 친구들과 파티를 하려고요.
남자: 네, 좋아요. 몇 시에 어디로 가면 돼요?
여자: 6시에 저희 집으로 오세요.
남자: 그런데 집이 어디예요?
여자: 서울백화점 근처예요. 내일 만나서 자세히 알려 드릴게요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Minsoo này, thứ tư tuần này cậu có thời gian không? Tớ mới chuyển nhà cách đây không lâu, tớ muốn tổ chức một bữa tiệc cùng với bạn bè. 
Nam: Ừ, được đó. Mấy giờ tớ đi thì được? 
Nữ: Đến nhà tớ lúc 6 giờ nha.
Nam: Nhưng mà nhà cậu ở đâu nhỉ?
Nữ: Nhà tớ ở gần trung tâm thương mại. Ngày mai gặp tớ sẽ hướng dẫn chi tiết hơn.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Minsu, do you have time this Wednesday? I just moved to a new house and I'm going to throw a party with my friends.
Man: Yes, that's fine. What time can I go?
Woman: Come to my house at 6 o'clock.
Man: But where is your house?
Woman: It's near the Seoul Department Store. I'll let you know in detail when we meet tomorrow.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Minsu, avez-vous le temps ce mercredi ? Je viens d'emménager dans une nouvelle maison et je vais organiser une fête avec mes amis.
Homme : Oui, ça va. A quelle heure puis-je partir ?
Femme : Viens chez moi à 6 heures.
Homme : Mais où est ta maison ?
Femme : C'est près du grand magasin de Séoul. Je vous tiendrai au courant en détail lors de notre rencontre demain.

#######

Woman: It's near the Seoul Department Store. I'll let you know in detail when we meet tomorrow.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 여보세요? 민수 씨, 지금 어디에 있어요?
남자: 저 지금 회사에 있는데요.
여자: 회사요? 왜 아직도 회사에 있어요? 전 지금 백화점 앞에서 30분이나 기다리고 있어요.
남자: 네? 약속 시간이 일곱 시 아니었어요?
여자: 아니에요. 우린 여섯 시에 만나기로 했어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Alo? Minsoo à, giờ anh đang ở đâu vậy? 
Nam: Tôi đang ở công ty. 
Nữ: Công ty ư? Sao bây giờ anh vẫn ở công ty? Tôi đã đợi ở trước trung tâm thương mại những 30 phút rồi đó.  
Nam: Gì cơ? Không phải giờ hẹn là bảy giờ sao.
Nữ: Không. Chúng ta hẹn gặp nhau lúc sáu giờ cơ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Hello? Minsu, where are you now?
Man: I'm at the company right now.
Woman: At the company? Why are you still at the company? I've been waiting for 30 minutes in front of the department store.
Man: What? Wasn't it 7 o'clock?
Woman: No. We decided to meet at six o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Bonjour ? Minsu, où es-tu maintenant ?
Homme : Je suis dans l'entreprise en ce moment.
Femme : À l'entreprise ? Pourquoi êtes-vous toujours dans l'entreprise ? J'attends depuis 30 minutes devant le grand magasin.
Homme : Quoi ? N'était-il pas 7 heures ?
Femme : Non. Nous avons décidé de nous rencontrer à 18 heures.

#######

Woman: No. We decided to meet at six o'clock.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 여보세요.
여자: 여보, 지금 어디예요?
남자: (다정하게) 집에 들어가고 있어요. 십 분 후에 도착할 거예요.
여자: 그래요? 지금 집에 손님이 오셨는데 과일이 없네요. 과일 좀 사 오세요.
남자: 알았어요. 무슨 과일을 사 갈까요?
여자: 딸기하고 바나나 좀 사 오세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Alo.
Nữ: Anh à, anh đang ở đâu vậy?
Nam: (Một cách thân mật) Anh đang về nhà. Mười phút nữa anh sẽ về đên.
Nữ: Vậy sao? Giờ nhà đang có khách mà lại hết hoa quả rồi. Anh mua một chút hoa quả về nhé.
Nam: Anh biết rồi. Nhưng mua quả gì được nhỉ?
Nữ: Anh mua dâu và chuối đi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Hello.
Woman: Honey, where are you?
Man: (Kindly) I'm going home. I will arrive in ten minutes.
Woman: Really? A guest has come to our house now, but there is no fruit. Buy some fruit.
Man: Okay. What fruit should I buy?
Woman: Buy some strawberries and bananas.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Bonjour.
Femme : Chérie, où es-tu ?
Homme : (gentiment) Je rentre à la maison. J'arrive dans dix minutes.
Femme : Vraiment ? Un invité est venu chez nous maintenant, mais il n'y a pas de fruit. Achetez des fruits.
Homme : D'accord. Quels fruits dois-je acheter ?
Femme : Achetez des fraises et des bananes.

#######

Woman: Honey, where are you?
Man: (Kindly) I'm going home. I will arrive in ten minutes.
Woman: Really? A guest has come to our house now, but there is no fruit. Buy some fruit.
Man: Okay. What fruit should I buy?
Woman: Buy some strawberries and bananas.

Hombre: (Amablemente) Me voy a casa. Llegaré en diez minutos.

Hombre: Está bien. ¿Qué fruta debo comprar?
Mujer: Compre algunas fresas y plátanos.

Donna: Compra delle fragole e delle banane.

남자: 수미 씨는 어떤 남자를 좋아해요?
여자: 저는 요리를 잘하고 이야기를 재미있게 하는 사람이 좋아요. 민수 씨는요?
남자: 저하고 취미가 같고 마음이 따뜻한 사람이 좋아요.
여자: 민수 씨는 테니스를 자주 치니까 운동을 좋아하는 여자가 좋겠네요.

Nữ: Tôi thích người nấu ăn giỏi và nói chuyện hài hước. Minsoo thì sao?
Nam: Tôi thích người có trái tim ấm áp và có cùng sở thích với mình.
Nữ: Minsoo hay đánh tennis, vậy là một cô gái giỏi chơi thể thao sẽ phù hợp.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 수미 씨, 회사 생활은 어때요?
여자: 일도 재미있고 같이 일하는 사람들도 모두 친절해서 좋아요. 그런데 회사가 멀어서 좀 힘들어요.
남자: 그래요? 얼마나 걸리는데요?
여자: 지하철로 두 시간쯤 걸려요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Sumi, cuộc sống ở công ty thế nào?
Nữ: Công việc thú vị và tất cả những người tôi làm việc cùng đều rất thân thiện. Nhưng công ty ở xa nên cũng hơi vất vả chút.
Nam: Vậy sao? Sumi đi mất bao lâu? 
Nữ: Mất khoảng 2 tiếng đi tàu điện ngầm.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Sumi, how is your company life?
Woman: The work is fun and the people I work with are all friendly. But it's a bit difficult because the company is far away.
Man: Is it? How long does it take?
Woman: It takes about two hours by subway.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Sumi, comment se passe la vie de votre entreprise ?
Femme : Le travail est amusant et les gens avec qui je travaille sont tous sympathiques. Mais c'est un peu difficile car l'entreprise est loin.
Homme : C'est ? Combien de temps cela prend-il?
Femme : Cela prend environ deux heures en métro.

#######

Woman: The work is fun and the people I work with are all friendly. But it's a bit difficult because the company is far away.
Man: Is it? How long does it take?
Woman: It takes about two hours by subway.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Sumi, ¿cómo es tu vida en la empresa?
Mujer: El trabajo es divertido y la gente con la que trabajo es amable. Pero es un poco difícil porque la empresa está lejos.
Hombre: ¿Lo es? ¿Cuánto tiempo se tarda?
Mujer: Se tarda unas dos horas en metro.

Kadın işten, iş arkadaşlarından, şirkete ulaşmanın ne kadar sürdüğünden bahsediyor, yani doğru cevap 1.

남자: 아니에요. 수미 씨가 영화를 안 봐서 그래요. 제가 그 영화 봤는데 다른 이야기예요.
여자: 그래요? 친구인 두 남자가 한 여자를 사랑하는, 뭐 그런 이야기 아니에요?
남자: 그런 사랑 이야기가 아니라 세 명의 친구가 같이 음악을 공부하면서 커 가는 이야기예요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Bộ phim có sự xuất hiện của Lee Minsoo lần này không phải giống với cuốn sách 'Ba người bạn' sao.
Nam: Không. Vì Sumi không xem phim nên mới nghĩ vậy đấy. Tôi xem bộ phim đó rồi, là một câu chuyện khác. 
Nữ: Vậy sao? Không phải câu chuyện hai nhân vật nam là bạn của nhau cùng yêu một cô gái sao?
Nam: Không phải chuyện tình yêu đó đâu, mà là câu chuyện ba người bạn cùng học âm nhạc và lớn lên.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Don't you think the movie that Lee Min-soo is starring in this time is similar to the book "Three Friends" that came out last year?
Man: No. It's because you don't watch movies, Sumi. I watched the movie and it's a different story.
Woman: Really? Isn't it about two men who are friends and love one woman?
Man: It's not that kind of love story, it's the story of three friends growing up studying music together.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Ne pensez-vous pas que le film dans lequel Lee Min-soo joue actuellement est similaire au livre "Three Friends" qui est sorti l'année dernière ?
Homme : Non. C'est parce que tu ne regardes pas de films, Sumi. J'ai regardé le film et c'est une autre histoire.
Femme : Vraiment ? Ne s'agit-il pas de deux hommes qui sont amis et qui aiment une femme ?
Homme : Ce n'est pas ce genre d'histoire d'amour, c'est l'histoire de trois amis qui grandissent ensemble en étudiant la musique.

Man: It's not that kind of love story, it's the story of three friends growing up studying music together.

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: क्या आपको नहीं लगता कि इस बार ली मिन-सू जिस फिल्म में अभिनय कर रही हैं, वह पिछले साल आई किताब "थ्री फ्रेंड्स" के समान है?
आदमी: नहीं, ऐसा इसलिए है क्योंकि तुम फिल्में नहीं देखती हो, सुमी। मैंने फिल्म देखी और यह एक अलग कहानी है।
महिला: सच में? क्या यह दो पुरुषों के बारे में नहीं है जो दोस्त हैं और एक महिला से प्यार करते हैं?
आदमी: यह उस तरह की प्रेम कहानी नहीं है, यह तीन दोस्तों की कहानी है जो एक साथ संगीत सीखते हुए बड़े हो रहे हैं।

#######

Woman: Don't you think the movie that Lee Min-soo is starring in this time is similar to the book "Three Friends" that came out last year?
Man: No. It's because you don't watch movies, Sumi. I watched the movie and it's a different story.
Woman: Really? Isn't it about two men who are friends and love one woman?
Man: It's not that kind of love story, it's the story of three friends growing up studying music together.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Lee Min-soo'nun bu dönemde başrolde olduğu filmin geçen yıl çıkan "Üç Arkadaş" kitabına benzediğini düşünmüyor musun?
Adam: Hayır. Film izlemediğin için öyle, Sumi. Filmi izledim, bambaşka bir hikaye.
Kadın: Gerçekten mi? Arkadaş olan ve bir kadını seven iki adam hakkında değil mi?
Adam: Bu öyle bir aşk hikayesi değil, birlikte müzik eğitimi alarak büyüyen üç arkadaşın hikayesi.

#######

Woman: Don't you think the movie that Lee Min-soo is starring in this time is similar to the book "Three Friends" that came out last year?
Man: No. It's because you don't watch movies, Sumi. I watched the movie and it's a different story.
Woman: Really? Isn't it about two men who are friends and love one woman?
Man: It's not that kind of love story, it's the story of three friends growing up studying music together.

explain.vi:
Chọn nội dung <u>khác</u> với đoạn băng được nghe.
1. Lee Minsoo xuất hiện trong bộ phim này.
2. Ba người trong bộ phim này là bạn.
3. Những người trong bộ phim này học âm nhạc.
4. Trong bộ phim này, hai chàng trai cùng yêu một cô gái.
--------------------
나오다: Lộ ra, xuất hiện

V + 아/어 가다: Sắp, đang, dần - Miêu tả trạng thái đang được tiếp diễn.
explain.en:
What is <u>different</u> from what you have heard?
1. Lee Min-soo appears in this movie.
2. The three people in this movie are friends.
3. People in this movie study music.
4. In this movie, two men love one woman.
--------------------
<g>나오다:</g> To come out, to appear

<g>V + 아/어 가다:</g> An action has done and keeps going.
explain.fr:
Qu'est-ce qui est <u>différent</u> de ce que vous avez entendu ?
1. Lee Min-soo apparaît dans ce film.
2. Les trois personnes dans ce film sont des amis.
3. Les gens dans ce film étudient la musique.
4. Dans ce film, deux hommes aiment une femme.
--------------------
<g>나오다:</g>Sortir, apparaître

<g>V + 아/어 가다:</g>Une action a été faite et continue.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 저 집 좀 보세요. 마당도 넓고 나무도 많아서 참 좋네요.
여자: 그러네요. 하지만 전 이렇게 조용한 시골에서는 못 살 것 같아요.
남자: 왜요? 전 좋을 것 같은데요.
여자: 시골은 불편할 것 같은데요. 가게나 영화관 같은 것도 멀고요. 전 도시가 좋아요. 정수 씨 정말 이런 곳에서 살 수 있어요?
남자: 그럼요. 저는 나중에 시골에 살고 싶어요. 공기가 맑아서 건강에도 좋고 또 복잡하지도 않으니까요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Nhìn ngôi nhà kia đi. Vườn rộng mà còn có nhiều cây nữa chứ.
Nữ: Đúng vậy. Nhưng chắc tôi không thể sống ở nông thôn yên tĩnh như thế này được đâu. 
Nam: Sao vậy? Tôi thấy tốt mà.
Nữ: Ở nông thôn có vẻ hơi bất tiện. Những nơi như các cửa hàng hay rạp chiếu phim thường ở xa. Tôi thích thành phố hơn. Anh Jeong Soo thực sự có thể sống ở nơi như này sao?
Nam: Đương nhiên rồi. Sau này tôi muốn sống ở nông thôn. Vì không khí rất trong lành và tốt cho sức khỏe, hơn nữa lại còn không phức tạp đông đúc nữa.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Look at that house. The yard is very large and there are many trees.
Woman: That's right. But I don't think I can live in this quiet countryside.
Man: Why? I think I'll be fine.
Woman: I think the countryside would be uncomfortable. Stores and cinemas are also far away. I like the city. Jeong Soo, can you really live in a place like this?
Man: Sure. I want to live in the countryside in the future. Because the air is clean, it is good for health and it is not complicated.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Regardez cette maison. La cour est très grande et il y a beaucoup d'arbres.
Femme : C'est vrai. Mais je ne pense pas pouvoir vivre dans cette campagne tranquille.
Homme : Pourquoi ? Je pense que ça ira.
Femme : Je pense que la campagne serait inconfortable. Les magasins et les cinémas sont également loin. J'aime la ville. Jeong Soo, pouvez-vous vraiment vivre dans un endroit comme celui-ci ?
Homme : Bien sûr. Je veux vivre à la campagne à l'avenir. Parce que l'air est pur, c'est bon pour la santé et ce n'est pas compliqué.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 수미 씨, 요즘 왜 그렇게 바빠요?
여자: 지난달부터 회사 연극 모임에 나가고 있어요.
남자: 연극 모임요? 연극을 보는 모임이에요?
여자: 네. 토요일마다 연극도 보고 공연 연습도 해요. 그래서 12월 말에는 공연도 하고요.
남자: 그래요? 수미 씨 얘기를 들으니까 저도 그 모임에 나가고 싶네요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Sao dạo này Sumi bận thế?
Nữ: Tôi tham gia vào buổi họp mặt diễn kịch của công ty.
Nam: Buổi họp mặt diễn kịch sao? Là buổi họp mặt để xem kịch?
Nữ: Vâng. Chúng tôi xem kịch và tập diễn kịch vào mỗi thứ bảy. Vì vậy cuối tháng 12 tới đây chúng tôi cũng sẽ biểu diễn.
Nam: Vậy sao? Nghe Sumi nói xong tôi cũng muốn đến buổi họp mặt đó.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Sumi, why are you so busy these days?
Woman: I've been going to company theater meetings since last month.
Man: A theater meeting? Is it a play-watching meeting?
Woman: Yes. We watch plays and practice performances every Saturday. We have a concert at the end of December.
Man: Really? After hearing from you, I want to go to that meeting too.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Sumi, pourquoi es-tu si occupée ces jours-ci ?
Femme : Je vais à des réunions de théâtre d'entreprise depuis le mois dernier.
Homme : Une réunion de théâtre ? Est-ce une réunion d'observation de jeu ?
Femme : Oui. Nous regardons des pièces de théâtre et nous nous entraînons tous les samedis. Nous avons un concert fin décembre.
Homme : Vraiment ? Après avoir entendu parler de vous, je veux aller à cette réunion aussi.

#######

Man: Sumi, why are you so busy these days?
Woman: I've been going to company theater meetings since last month.
Man: A theater meeting? Is it a play-watching meeting?
Woman: Yes. We watch plays and practice performances every Saturday. We have a concert at the end of December.
Man: Really? After hearing from you, I want to go to that meeting too.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Sumi, ¿por qué estás tan ocupado estos días?
Mujer: He estado yendo a reuniones de teatro de la compañía desde el mes pasado.
Hombre: ¿Una reunión de teatro? ¿Es una reunión para ver jugar?
Mujer: Sí. Vemos obras de teatro y practicamos actuaciones todos los sábados. Tenemos un concierto a finales de diciembre.
Hombre: ¿En serio? Después de saber de ti, yo también quiero ir a esa reunión.

#######

Man: Sumi, why are you so busy these days?
Woman: I've been going to company theater meetings since last month.
Man: A theater meeting? Is it a play-watching meeting?
Woman: Yes. We watch plays and practice performances every Saturday. We have a concert at the end of December.
Man: Really? After hearing from you, I want to go to that meeting too.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Sumi, kenapa kamu begitu sibuk akhir-akhir ini?
Wanita: Saya sudah pergi ke pertemuan teater perusahaan sejak bulan lalu.
Pria: Pertemuan teater? Apakah ini pertemuan menonton drama?
Wanita: Ya. Kami menonton drama dan berlatih pertunjukan setiap hari Sabtu. Kami memiliki konser pada akhir Desember.
Pria: Benarkah? Setelah mendengar dari Anda, saya ingin pergi ke pertemuan itu juga.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 내일 친구를 만나는데 뭘 하면 좋을까요?
남자: 글쎄요. 미술관 같은 곳에 가 보는 건 어때요?
여자: 미술관은 그냥 그림만 보는 곳이니까 좀 심심할 것 같아요.
남자: 아니에요. 생각보다 재미있어요. 제가 지난주에 간 미술관에서는 그림을 손으로 만질 수도 있고 그림 속에 들어가서 사진을 찍는 곳도 있었어요.
여자: 그래요? 그러면 내일 친구하고 미술관에 가야겠네요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Mai tớ đi gặp bạn, tớ nên làm gì nhỉ?
Nam: Xem nào. Cậu thấy đi những nơi như bảo tàng mỹ thuật thế nào? 
Nữ: Ở bảo tàng mỹ thuật thì cũng chỉ xem tranh thôi nên chắc là hơi chán.
Nam: Không đâu. Thú vị hơn cậu nghĩ đấy. Tuần trước tớ vừa tới đó,  có thể dùng tay sờ vào tranh và bên trong tranh có cả chỗ để chụp ảnh nữa.
Nữ: Vậy sao? Vậy mai tớ phải cùng bạn tới đó mới được.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: I'm meeting my friend tomorrow, so what should I do?
Man: Well. How about going to a place like an art museum?
Woman: Art museums are just places to look at paintings, so it must be boring.
Man: No. It's more fun than you think. At the art museum I went to last week, there was a place where I could touch a painting with my hands and take pictures in it.
Woman: Is it? Then I'll have to go to the art museum with my friend tomorrow.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Je rencontre mon ami demain, alors que dois-je faire ?
Homme : Eh bien. Que diriez-vous d'aller dans un endroit comme un musée d'art ?
Femme : Les musées d'art ne sont que des endroits où regarder des peintures, donc ça doit être ennuyeux.
Homme : Non. C'est plus amusant que vous ne le pensez. Au musée d'art où je suis allé la semaine dernière, il y avait un endroit où je pouvais toucher un tableau avec mes mains et y prendre des photos.
Femme : C'est ? Ensuite, je devrai aller au musée d'art avec mon ami demain.

#######

Woman: I'm meeting my friend tomorrow, so what should I do?
Man: Well. How about going to a place like an art museum?
Woman: Art museums are just places to look at paintings, so it must be boring.
Man: No. It's more fun than you think. At the art museum I went to last week, there was a place where I could touch a painting with my hands and take pictures in it.
Woman: Is it? Then I'll have to go to the art museum with my friend tomorrow.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Hombre: Bueno. ¿Qué tal ir a un lugar como un museo de arte?
Mujer: Los museos de arte son solo lugares para mirar pinturas, así que debe ser aburrido.
Hombre: No. Es más divertido de lo que crees. En el museo de arte al que fui la semana pasada, había un lugar donde podía tocar una pintura con mis manos y tomar fotografías en ella.
Mujer: ¿Lo es? Entonces tendré que ir al museo de arte con mi amigo mañana.

आदमी: अच्छा. किसी कला संग्रहालय जैसी जगह पर जाना कैसा रहेगा?
महिला: कला संग्रहालय केवल पेंटिंग देखने की जगह हैं, इसलिए यह उबाऊ होगा।
आदमी: नहीं, यह जितना तुम सोचते हो उससे कहीं अधिक मज़ेदार है। पिछले सप्ताह मैं जिस कला संग्रहालय में गया था, वहाँ एक जगह थी जहाँ मैं किसी पेंटिंग को अपने हाथों से छू सकता था और उसमें तस्वीरें ले सकता था।
महिला: क्या ऐसा है? फिर मुझे कल अपने दोस्त के साथ कला संग्रहालय जाना होगा।

#######

Woman: I'm meeting my friend tomorrow, so what should I do?
Man: Well. How about going to a place like an art museum?
Woman: Art museums are just places to look at paintings, so it must be boring.
Man: No. It's more fun than you think. At the art museum I went to last week, there was a place where I could touch a painting with my hands and take pictures in it.
Woman: Is it? Then I'll have to go to the art museum with my friend tomorrow.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Yarın arkadaşımla buluşacağım, ne yapmalıyım?
Adam: Peki. Sanat müzesi gibi bir yere gitmeye ne dersiniz?
Kadın: Sanat müzeleri sadece tablolara bakılan yerler, yani sıkıcı olsa gerek.
Adam: Hayır. Düşündüğünden daha eğlenceli. Geçen hafta gittiğim sanat müzesinde bir tabloya ellerimle dokunup, içinde fotoğraf çekebileceğim bir yer vardı.
Kadın: Öyle mi? O halde yarın arkadaşımla sanat müzesine gitmem gerekecek.

#######

Woman: I'm meeting my friend tomorrow, so what should I do?
Man: Well. How about going to a place like an art museum?
Woman: Art museums are just places to look at paintings, so it must be boring.
Man: No. It's more fun than you think. At the art museum I went to last week, there was a place where I could touch a painting with my hands and take pictures in it.
Woman: Is it? Then I'll have to go to the art museum with my friend tomorrow.

--------------------

<g>만지다:</g>สัมผัส

<g>V + (으)려고 하다:</g>วางแผนที่จะ, ตั้งใจที่จะ.
<g>V/A + 아/어야겠다:</g>ฉันต้อง ฉันต้อง

<g>만지다:</g> To touch

<g>V + (으)려고 하다:</g> To plan to, to intend to.
<g>V/A + 아/어야겠다:</g> I have to, I need to.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 민수 씨는 나중에 무슨 일을 하고 싶어요?
남자: 저는 여러 나라의 사람들을 만날 수 있는 일을 하고 싶어요.
여자: 그럼, 여러 나라를 여행하는 것도 좋아하겠네요?
남자: 네. 또 유명한 곳과 그 나라의 음식에도 관심이 많아요. 미영 씨는요?
여자: 전 그림 그리는 것을 좋아해요. 앞으로 그림 그리는 일을 하면 좋겠어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Sau này Minsoo muốn làm gì?
Nam: Tôi muốn làm công việc có thể gặp mọi người ở các nước trên thế giới.
Nữ: Vậy là anh thích đi du lịch ở nhiều nước nhỉ?
Nam: Đúng vậy. Tôi cũng rất quan tâm đến những địa điểm nổi tiếng và các món ăn của đất nước đó. Miyoung thì sao?
Nữ: Tôi thích vẽ tranh. Sau này tôi mong mình có thể làm công việc vẽ tranh.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Minsu, what do you want to do in the future?
Man: I want to do a job where I can meet people from different countries.
Woman: So, would you like to travel to different countries?
Man: Yes. I am also very interested in famous places and the food of that country. What about you, Miyoung?
Woman: I like painting. I hope to do a painting job in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Minsu, que veux-tu faire à l'avenir ?
Homme : Je veux faire un travail où je peux rencontrer des gens de différents pays.
Femme : Alors, aimeriez-vous voyager dans différents pays ?
Homme : Oui. Je suis également très intéressé par les lieux célèbres et la nourriture de ce pays. Et toi, Miyoung ?
Femme : J'aime peindre. J'espère faire un travail de peinture à l'avenir.

#######

Woman: Minsu, what do you want to do in the future?
Man: I want to do a job where I can meet people from different countries.
Woman: So, would you like to travel to different countries?
Man: Yes. I am also very interested in famous places and the food of that country. What about you, Miyoung?
Woman: I like painting. I hope to do a painting job in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Minsu, ¿qué quieres hacer en el futuro?
Hombre: Quiero hacer un trabajo donde pueda conocer gente de diferentes países.
Mujer: Entonces, ¿te gustaría viajar a diferentes países?
Hombre: Sí. También me interesan mucho los lugares famosos y la comida de ese país. ¿Qué hay de ti, Miyoung?
Mujer: Me gusta pintar. Espero hacer un trabajo de pintura en el futuro.

Pria: Saya ingin melakukan pekerjaan di mana saya bisa bertemu orang-orang dari berbagai negara.
Wanita: Jadi, apakah Anda ingin bepergian ke berbagai negara?
Pria: Ya. Saya juga sangat tertarik dengan tempat-tempat terkenal dan makanan negara itu. Bagaimana denganmu, Miyoung?
Wanita: Saya suka melukis. Saya berharap untuk melakukan pekerjaan melukis di masa depan.

여자: 고향에 계신 부모님을 만나러 갈까 해요.

여자: 네. 지난 명절에도 회사 일 때문에 집에 못 갔어요. 민호 씨는 휴가 때 어디 가세요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Sumi sẽ làm gì trong kỳ nghỉ này?
Nữ: Tôi định về gặp bố mẹ đang ở quê.
Nam: Bố mẹ chị sẽ vui lắm.
Nữ: Ừ. Dịp lễ trước vì việc của công ty mà tôi không về được. Vậy Minho định đi đâu trong kỳ nghỉ này?
Nam: Lần này tôi sẽ đi du lịch nước ngoài cùng gia đình.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What will you do this vacation, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to visit her parents in my hometown.
Man: Your parents will be happy.
Woman: Yes. Last holiday, I couldn't go home because of work. Where do go on vacation, Minho?
Man: This time, I'm going on an overseas trip with my family.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Qu'allez-vous faire pendant ces vacances, Sumi ?
Femme : Je vais rendre visite à ses parents dans ma ville natale.
Homme : Vos parents seront heureux.
Femme : Oui. Les dernières vacances, je n'ai pas pu rentrer chez moi à cause du travail. Où vas-tu en vacances, Minho ?
Homme : Cette fois, je pars en voyage à l'étranger avec ma famille.

ผู้ชาย: พ่อแม่ของคุณจะมีความสุข
ผู้หญิง: ใช่. วันหยุดที่แล้วฉันไม่สามารถกลับบ้านได้เพราะติดงาน มินโฮไปเที่ยวที่ไหน?
ผู้ชาย: คราวนี้ผมจะไปเที่ยวต่างประเทศกับครอบครัวครับ

#######

Man: What will you do this vacation, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to visit her parents in my hometown.
Man: Your parents will be happy.
Woman: Yes. Last holiday, I couldn't go home because of work. Where do go on vacation, Minho?
Man: This time, I'm going on an overseas trip with my family.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: O que você vai fazer nessas férias, Sumi?
Mulher: Vou visitar os pais dela na minha cidade natal.
Homem: Seus pais ficarão felizes.
Mulher: Sim. No feriado passado, não pude ir para casa por causa do trabalho. Para onde vais de férias, Minho?
Homem: Desta vez, vou fazer uma viagem ao exterior com minha família.

#######

Man: What will you do this vacation, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to visit her parents in my hometown.
Man: Your parents will be happy.

Man: This time, I'm going on an overseas trip with my family.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: इस छुट्टी में क्या करोगी सुमी?
महिला: मैं अपने गृहनगर में उसके माता-पिता से मिलने जा रही हूं।
आदमी: आपके माता-पिता खुश होंगे.
महिला: हाँ. पिछली छुट्टियों में मैं काम के कारण घर नहीं जा सका। छुट्टियों पर कहाँ जाते हैं, मिन्हो?
आदमी: इस बार, मैं अपने परिवार के साथ विदेश यात्रा पर जा रहा हूँ।

#######

Man: What will you do this vacation, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to visit her parents in my hometown.
Man: Your parents will be happy.
Woman: Yes. Last holiday, I couldn't go home because of work. Where do go on vacation, Minho?
Man: This time, I'm going on an overseas trip with my family.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Bu tatilde ne yapacaksın Sumi?
Kadın: Memleketimde anne ve babasını ziyaret edeceğim.
Adam: Annenle baban mutlu olacak.
Kadın: Evet. Geçen tatilde iş nedeniyle eve gidemedim. Tatile nereye gideriz Minho?
Adam: Bu sefer ailemle birlikte yurtdışı gezisine çıkıyorum.

#######

Man: This time, I'm going on an overseas trip with my family.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 수미 씨는 어렸을 때 어땠어요?
여자: 저는 말이 별로 없고 조용했어요.
남자: 정말요? 지금 수미 씨를 보면 전혀 안 그랬을 것 같은데요?
여자: 어렸을 때는 혼자 생각하거나 글 쓰는 것을 더 좋아했어요. 그런데 동아리 활동을 하면서 많이 바뀌었어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Hồi bé Sumi là người thế nào?
Nữ: Tôi là người ít nói và trầm tính.
Nam: Thật sao? Bây giờ trông Sumi có vẻ không như vậy tí nào luôn. 
Nữ: Hồi bé tôi thích suy nghĩ một mình hoặc viết ra hơn. Nhưng bây giờ tôi tham gia câu lạc bộ và đã thay đổi rất nhiều rồi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: How were you as a child, Sumi?
Woman: I didn't talk much and was quiet.
Man: Really? Looking at Sumi now, I don't think it was like that at all?
Woman: When I was young, I preferred to think alone or write. But it changed a lot during club activities.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Comment étiez-vous enfant, Sumi ?
Femme : Je ne parlais pas beaucoup et je me taisais.
Homme : Vraiment ? En regardant Sumi maintenant, je ne pense pas que ce soit comme ça du tout ?
Femme : Quand j'étais jeune, je préférais penser seule ou écrire. Mais cela a beaucoup changé pendant les activités du club.

#######

Man: How were you as a child, Sumi?
Woman: I didn't talk much and was quiet.
Man: Really? Looking at Sumi now, I don't think it was like that at all?
Woman: When I was young, I preferred to think alone or write. But it changed a lot during club activities.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Cómo eras de niño, Sumi?
Mujer: No hablaba mucho y estaba callada.
Hombre: ¿En serio? Mirando a Sumi ahora, ¿no creo que fuera así en absoluto?
Mujer: Cuando era joven, prefería pensar sola o escribir. Pero cambió mucho durante las actividades del club.

Wanita: Saya tidak banyak bicara dan pendiam.
Pria: Benarkah? Melihat Sumi sekarang, saya tidak berpikir seperti itu sama sekali?
Wanita: Ketika saya masih muda, saya lebih suka berpikir sendiri atau menulis. Tapi itu banyak berubah selama kegiatan klub.

#######

g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: スミ、子供の頃はどうだった?
女：あまりしゃべらず、静かでした。
男: 本当ですか？今のスミを見ると、全然そんなことなかったんじゃない？
女性: 若い頃は、一人で考えるか書くのが好きでした。でも、部活で大きく変わりました。

#######

Man: How were you as a child, Sumi?
Woman: I didn't talk much and was quiet.
Man: Really? Looking at Sumi now, I don't think it was like that at all?
Woman: When I was young, I preferred to think alone or write. But it changed a lot during club activities.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Wie warst du als Kind, Sumi?
Frau: Ich habe nicht viel geredet und war ruhig.
Mann: Wirklich? Wenn ich mir Sumi jetzt anschaue, glaube ich, dass es überhaupt nicht so war?
Frau: Als ich jung war, habe ich lieber alleine gedacht oder geschrieben. Aber es änderte sich viel während der Vereinsaktivitäten.

#######

Man: How were you as a child, Sumi?
Woman: I didn't talk much and was quiet.
Man: Really? Looking at Sumi now, I don't think it was like that at all?
Woman: When I was young, I preferred to think alone or write. But it changed a lot during club activities.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：你小时候怎么样，Sumi？
女：我话不多，很安静。
男：真的吗？现在看苏米，我觉得根本就不是这样？
女：年轻的时候，我更喜欢独自思考或写作。但在俱乐部活动期间，情况发生了很大变化。

#######

Man: How were you as a child, Sumi?

Woman: When I was young, I preferred to think alone or write. But it changed a lot during club activities.

Donna: non parlavo molto e stavo zitto.

Donna: Quando ero giovane, preferivo pensare da sola o scrivere. Ma è cambiato molto durante le attività del club.

g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Каким ты была в детстве, Суми?
Женщина: Я мало говорила и молчала.
Мужчина: Правда? Глядя на Суми сейчас, я не думаю, что это было совсем так?
Женщина: Когда я была молодой, я предпочитала думать в одиночестве или писать. Но за время деятельности клуба многое изменилось.

g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: ตอนเด็กๆ เป็นยังไงบ้าง ซูมิ?
ผู้หญิง: ฉันไม่ได้พูดมากและก็เงียบ
ผู้ชาย: จริงเหรอ? เมื่อมองดูซูมิแล้ว ฉันไม่คิดว่ามันจะเป็นแบบนั้นเลยเหรอ?
ผู้หญิง: ตอนเด็กๆ ฉันชอบคิดคนเดียวหรือเขียนมากกว่า แต่มันเปลี่ยนไปมากระหว่างกิจกรรมของชมรม

#######

Man: How were you as a child, Sumi?
Woman: I didn't talk much and was quiet.
Man: Really? Looking at Sumi now, I don't think it was like that at all?
Woman: When I was young, I preferred to think alone or write. But it changed a lot during club activities.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Como você era quando criança, Sumi?
Mulher: Não falei muito e fiquei quieta.
Homem: Sério? Olhando para Sumi agora, não acho que tenha sido assim?
Mulher: Quando eu era jovem, preferia pensar sozinha ou escrever. Mas mudou muito durante as atividades do clube.

#######

Man: How were you as a child, Sumi?

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: बचपन में तुम कैसी थीं सुमी?
महिला: मैं ज्यादा बात नहीं करती थी और शांत रहती थी।
आदमी: सच में? अब सुमी को देखकर मुझे नहीं लगता कि ऐसा बिल्कुल भी था?
महिला: जब मैं छोटी थी तो अकेले सोचना या लिखना पसंद करती थी। लेकिन क्लब की गतिविधियों के दौरान इसमें बहुत बदलाव आया।

#######

Man: How were you as a child, Sumi?
Woman: I didn't talk much and was quiet.
Man: Really? Looking at Sumi now, I don't think it was like that at all?
Woman: When I was young, I preferred to think alone or write. But it changed a lot during club activities.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Çocukken nasıldın Sumi?
Kadın: Pek konuşmadım, sustum.
Adam: Gerçekten mi? Şimdi Sumi'ye baktığımda, hiç de öyle olduğunu düşünmüyorum?
Kadın: Gençken yalnız düşünmeyi ya da yazmayı tercih ederdim. Ama kulüp faaliyetleri sırasında çok değişti.

#######

Man: How were you as a child, Sumi?
Woman: I didn't talk much and was quiet.
Man: Really? Looking at Sumi now, I don't think it was like that at all?
Woman: When I was young, I preferred to think alone or write. But it changed a lot during club activities.

explain.vi:
Chọn nội dung phù hợp với đoạn băng được nghe.
1. Hai người ít nói.
2. Người phụ nữ định đi tới câu lạc bộ.
3. Người phụ nữ đã thích viết.
4. Hai người là bạn từ khi còn nhỏ.
--------------------
V + 는 것/기: Việc, chuyện (Danh từ hóa động từ).
V/A + 거나: Hoặc.
explain.en:
Choose the answer that fits what you heard.
1. The two don't talk much.
2. The woman wants to go to a club.
3. The woman liked writing.
4. The two have been friends since childhood.
--------------------
<g>V + 는 것/기:</g> Describing nouns with verbs.
<g>V/A + 거나:</g> Or.

1、兩人話不多。
2. 女人想去俱樂部。
3. 女人喜歡寫作。
4. 兩人從小就是朋友。
--------------------
<g>V + 는 것/기:</g>用動詞描述名詞。
<g>V/A + 거나:</g>或者。

#######

Choose the answer that fits what you heard.
1. The two don't talk much.
2. The woman wants to go to a club.
3. The woman liked writing.
4. The two have been friends since childhood.
--------------------
<g>V + 는 것/기:</g> Describing nouns with verbs.
<g>V/A + 거나:</g> Or.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 민수 씨, 혹시 영화 ‘여고시대’ 봤어요? 전 어제 봤는데 제 이야기 같아서 정말 좋았어요.
남자: 저도 어제 봤는데 20년 전 고등학교 다닐 때 생각이 많이 났어요. 그거 영화를 만든 사람의 진짜 이야기죠?
여자: 네. 그래서 40세 이상의 사람들한테 인기가 많은 것 같아요.
남자: 그 영화를 보니까 저도 옛날 친구들이 많이 생각났어요.
여자: 맞아요. 저도 옛날 친구들이 보고 싶어서 졸업 앨범을 봤어요. 연락도 한번 해 보려고요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Minsu, anh đã xem phim 'Thời đại nữ sinh' chưa? Hôm qua tôi đã xem và tôi rất vui vì nó giống như câu chuyện của tôi.
Nam: Hôm qua tôi cũng xem và tôi thấy nhớ rất nhiều về thời trung học 20 năm trước. Đó là câu chuyện thật của người làm phim đúng không?
Nữ: Vâng. Vì vậy tôi nghĩ đó là lý do tại sao những người trên 40 tuổi lại yêu thích (bộ phim này).
Nam: Xem bộ phim đó tôi cũng đã nhớ đến bạn bè ngày xưa của mình.
Nữ: Đúng vậy. Tôi cũng nhớ các bạn cũ nên đã xem album tốt nghiệp của mình. Tôi cũng sẽ liên lạc (với các bạn) thử một lần.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Minsu, have you ever seen the movie ‘Girls’ High School Generation’? I saw it yesterday and I really liked it because it was like my story.
Man: I saw it yesterday too, and it reminded me a lot of 20 years ago when I was in high school. That's the real story of the person who made the movie, right?
Woman: Yes. So I think it's very popular with people over the age of 40.
Man: Seeing that movie reminded me a lot of old friends too.
Woman: That's right. I also wanted to see my old friends, so I looked at the graduation album. I'm also trying to contact them.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Minsu, avez-vous déjà vu le film "Girls' High School Generation" ? Je l'ai vu hier et j'ai beaucoup aimé parce que c'était comme mon histoire.
Homme : Je l'ai vu hier aussi, et ça m'a beaucoup rappelé il y a 20 ans, quand j'étais au lycée. C'est la véritable histoire de la personne qui a fait le film, n'est-ce pas ?
Femme : Oui. Je pense donc que c'est très populaire auprès des personnes de plus de 40 ans.
Homme : Voir ce film m'a aussi rappelé beaucoup de vieux amis.
Femme : C'est vrai. Je voulais aussi voir mes vieux amis, alors j'ai regardé l'album de fin d'études. J'essaye aussi de les contacter.

#######

Woman: Minsu, have you ever seen the movie ‘Girls’ High School Generation’? I saw it yesterday and I really liked it because it was like my story.
Man: I saw it yesterday too, and it reminded me a lot of 20 years ago when I was in high school. That's the real story of the person who made the movie, right?
Woman: Yes. So I think it's very popular with people over the age of 40.
Man: Seeing that movie reminded me a lot of old friends too.
Woman: That's right. I also wanted to see my old friends, so I looked at the graduation album. I'm also trying to contact them.

Женщина: Минсу, ты когда-нибудь смотрел фильм «Поколение девочек-старшеклассников»? Я видел это вчера, и оно мне очень понравилось, потому что это было похоже на мою историю.

Женщина: Верно. Еще мне захотелось увидеться со старыми друзьями, поэтому я заглянул в выпускной альбом. Я тоже пытаюсь с ними связаться.

g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: มินซู คุณเคยดูภาพยนตร์เรื่อง 'Girls' High School Generation' บ้างไหม? ฉันเห็นมันเมื่อวานนี้และฉันชอบมันมากเพราะมันเหมือนกับเรื่องราวของฉัน
ผู้ชาย: เมื่อวานฉันก็เห็นมันเหมือนกัน มันทำให้ฉันนึกถึงเมื่อ 20 ปีที่แล้ว ตอนที่ฉันอยู่มัธยมปลายมาก นั่นเป็นเรื่องจริงของคนทำหนังใช่ไหมครับ?
ผู้หญิง: ใช่. เลยคิดว่าเป็นที่นิยมมากกับคนอายุ 40 ขึ้นไป
ผู้ชาย: การได้ดูหนังเรื่องนี้ทำให้ฉันนึกถึงเพื่อนเก่าๆ หลายคนเหมือนกัน
ผู้หญิง: ถูกต้อง. ฉันอยากเจอเพื่อนเก่าด้วย เลยดูอัลบั้มรับปริญญา ฉันกำลังพยายามติดต่อพวกเขาอยู่เช่นกัน

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: मिंसु, क्या तुमने कभी 'गर्ल्स हाई स्कूल जेनरेशन' फिल्म देखी है? मैंने इसे कल देखा और मुझे यह सचमुच पसंद आया क्योंकि यह मेरी कहानी जैसी थी।
आदमी: मैंने इसे कल भी देखा था, और इसने मुझे 20 साल पहले की याद दिला दी जब मैं हाई स्कूल में था। यह उस व्यक्ति की वास्तविक कहानी है जिसने फिल्म बनाई है, है ना?
महिला: हाँ. इसलिए मुझे लगता है कि यह 40 वर्ष से अधिक उम्र के लोगों के बीच बहुत लोकप्रिय है।
आदमी: उस फिल्म को देखकर मुझे भी कई पुराने दोस्तों की याद आ गई।
महिला: यह सही है. मैं भी अपने पुराने दोस्तों को देखना चाहता था, इसलिए मैंने ग्रेजुएशन एल्बम देखा। मैं भी उनसे संपर्क करने की कोशिश कर रहा हूं.

#######

Woman: Minsu, have you ever seen the movie ‘Girls’ High School Generation’? I saw it yesterday and I really liked it because it was like my story.
Man: I saw it yesterday too, and it reminded me a lot of 20 years ago when I was in high school. That's the real story of the person who made the movie, right?
Woman: Yes. So I think it's very popular with people over the age of 40.
Man: Seeing that movie reminded me a lot of old friends too.
Woman: That's right. I also wanted to see my old friends, so I looked at the graduation album. I'm also trying to contact them.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Minsu, 'Girls' High School Generation' filmini hiç izledin mi? Dün gördüm ve çok beğendim çünkü benim hikayeme benziyordu.
Adam: Ben de dün gördüm ve bana 20 yıl önce lisedeki zamanlarımı hatırlattı. Filmi yapan kişinin gerçek hikayesi bu, değil mi?
Kadın: Evet. Bu yüzden 40 yaş üstü insanlar arasında çok popüler olduğunu düşünüyorum.
Adam: O filmi görmek bana da birçok eski arkadaşımı hatırlattı.
Kadın: Aynen öyle. Ben de eski arkadaşlarımı görmek istediğim için mezuniyet albümüne baktım. Ben de onlarla iletişime geçmeye çalışıyorum.

#######

Woman: Minsu, have you ever seen the movie ‘Girls’ High School Generation’? I saw it yesterday and I really liked it because it was like my story.
Man: I saw it yesterday too, and it reminded me a lot of 20 years ago when I was in high school. That's the real story of the person who made the movie, right?
Woman: Yes. So I think it's very popular with people over the age of 40.
Man: Seeing that movie reminded me a lot of old friends too.
Woman: That's right. I also wanted to see my old friends, so I looked at the graduation album. I'm also trying to contact them.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 요즘 잠을 잘 못 자는데 어떻게 하면 좋을까요?
남자: 저는 얼마 전부터 잠을 자기 전에 운동을 해요. 그러면 잠이 잘 와요.
여자: 무슨 운동을 하는데요?
남자: 집 안에서 할 수 있는 가벼운 운동을 해요. 수미 씨도 한번 해 보세요. 그런데 자기 바로 전에 너무 힘든 운동을 하거나 음식을 먹으면 잠을 못 잘 수도 있어요.
여자: 그렇군요. 저도 오늘부터 운동을 해 볼게요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Dạo này tôi không ngủ được, không biết phải làm sao đây?
Nam: Trước đây, tôi thường tập thể dục trước khi đi ngủ. Như vậy tôi dễ ngủ hơn.
Nữ: Bạn tập thể dục gì?
Nam: Tôi tập những bài nhẹ nhàng mà ở trong nhà cũng có thể tập. Sumi cũng thử một lần xem sao. Tuy nhiên, nếu bạn tập thể dục hoặc ăn quá nhiều ngay trước khi ngủ, bạn có thể không ngủ được.
Nữ: Đúng vậy. Bắt đầu từ hôm nay tôi sẽ thử tập thể dục.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: I can't sleep well these days, what should I do?
Man: I've been exercising before I go to bed for a while. Then I can sleep well.
Woman: What kind of exercise do you do?
Man: I do light exercises that I can do at home. Sumi, you should try it too. But you might not be able to sleep if you exercise too hard or eat food right before you go to bed.
Woman: I see. I'll start exercising from today.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Je ne peux pas bien dormir ces jours-ci, que dois-je faire ?
Homme : Je fais de l'exercice avant d'aller au lit depuis un moment. Alors je peux bien dormir.
Femme : Quel type d'exercice faites-vous ?
Homme : Je fais des exercices légers que je peux faire à la maison. Sumi, tu devrais essayer aussi. Mais vous ne pourrez peut-être pas dormir si vous faites trop d'exercice ou si vous mangez juste avant d'aller au lit.
Femme : Je vois. Je vais commencer à m'entraîner à partir d'aujourd'hui.

#######

Woman: I can't sleep well these days, what should I do?
Man: I've been exercising before I go to bed for a while. Then I can sleep well.
Woman: What kind of exercise do you do?
Man: I do light exercises that I can do at home. Sumi, you should try it too. But you might not be able to sleep if you exercise too hard or eat food right before you go to bed.
Woman: I see. I'll start exercising from today.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: No puedo dormir bien estos días, ¿qué debo hacer?
Hombre: He estado haciendo ejercicio antes de irme a la cama por un tiempo. Entonces puedo dormir bien.
Mujer: ¿Qué tipo de ejercicio haces?
Hombre: Hago ejercicios ligeros que puedo hacer en casa. Sumi, deberías probarlo también. Pero es posible que no pueda dormir si hace demasiado ejercicio o come alimentos justo antes de acostarse.
Mujer: Ya veo. Voy a empezar a hacer ejercicio a partir de hoy.

#######
